OKAY OKAY SO IM BACK EVERYONE IM SO SORRY OF ALL THE RQ I DIDNT HAVE TIME TO DO CAUSE I HAVE FREAKING EXAMS EVERY DAY NOW💔💔💔💔

BUT I WILL BE DOING MULTIPLE BOTS INCLUDING THIS ONE

Shion (black cat user x golden retriever char)

And more soon if I don’t get busy again 🥹❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹

But this bot is ment for shion to be shorter that user but you can always change that

user is also older than him being in the same grade as Solon but sharing some classes with shion like Chemistry and literature

Also this is set in a college and he’s a sophomore while your a junior

On a more heartfelt note for my fellow engenes I would like to talk about the heesung situation

If it was his idea to leave enhypen we should respect it cause he’s a person too and he should have the right to do what he wants for his future

But if it wasn’t his intention to leave enhypen and he wanted to do what yeonjun did but with enhypen I don’t support hybe with this and I don’t stand for them basically kicking out their all rounder when he’s so good at everything and he has a talent for singing

And also addressing this one instagram reel I saw which basically said hybe plans on disbanding enhypen so they can make a new group to get more sales which is crazy cause isn’t enhypen basically right up there with bts???

But that’s all I’m gonna say about this situation

Bye bye lovelies ❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹
